title: Active Projects and Priorities
content:
# VAULT-INDEX
> Last updated: 2026-03-13

## Who I Am
Cole — data analyst at Iron Tree Service. Independently building Sylvara (tree service CRM/ops SaaS), Lumen GM Hub (AI-powered GM companion for PF2e/Foundry VTT), and Failstate (2D roguelike, back-burnered). Using AI-assisted development as a primary workflow. Long-term goal: independent income through software.

## Active Projects

| Project | Status | Priority | Last Touched |
|---|---|---|---|
| Sylvara | Active — Scheduling App deployed to production (scheduler.sylvara.app) | 🔴 High | 2026-03-13 |
| Lumen GM Hub | Active — PoC build phase (audio pipeline validation) | 🟡 Medium | 2026-03-10 |
| Failstate | Paused — back-burnered while Sylvara and Lumen are active | ⚪ Low | — |
| Iron Tree | Ongoing — data analyst work | 🔴 High | — |

## Current Focus
- **Sylvara** is the #1 priority. Scheduling App is deployed to production. Demo for John and Eric on Monday 2026-03-16. Everything else is secondary.
- **Lumen** is the secondary project. Currently in PoC phase — validating whether the core audio pipeline works. See `projects/lumen/plan.md` for the phased build plan.
- **Failstate** is intentionally shelved. Do not start Failstate work unless Cole explicitly re-prioritizes it.

## Key Documents

### Sylvara
- `projects/sylvara/plan.md` — data model + feature spec
- `projects/sylvara/AGENTS.md` — Codex operational guidelines
- `brain/sylvara.md` — project knowledge base (facts, decisions, open questions)
- `brain/sylvara-architecture.md` — technical architecture and infrastructure decisions
- `brain/sylvara-ops.md` — deployment, environment, and operational knowledge

### Lumen GM Hub
- `projects/lumen/plan.md` — PoC build plan + condensed architecture reference
- `projects/lumen/AGENTS.md` — Codex operational guidelines
- `projects/lumen/spec_v3.pdf` — full product specification (18 pages, reference doc — not for daily use)
- `brain/lumen.md` — project knowledge base (facts, decisions, open questions)
- `brain/lumen-architecture.md` — technical architecture decisions and ADRs
- `brain/lumen-business.md` — business model, pricing, and go-to-market thinking

### Iron Tree
- Sales intelligence report (dynamically generated from Pipedrive CSV)

## Open Threads
- [ ] Monday demo: John and Eric sign in → webhook → promote via Admin page
- [ ] Savannah account pending (sent link, awaiting sign-in)
- [ ] Live webhook test with throwaway account before Monday
- [ ] Sylvara post-demo backlog (toasts, Tier 2 UI, rate limiting)
- [ ] Sylvara schema v1.2 implementation
- [ ] Iron Tree sales intelligence report (dynamic rebuild from Pipedrive CSV)
- [ ] Lumen PoC Phase 1 — Whisper benchmarking on RTX 3070
- [ ] Lumen PoC Phase 2 — WebRTC VoIP client integration

## Recent Sessions
- [[journal/sylvara/2026-03-13]] — Full production deployment. Auth debugging, webhook setup, security audit, UI polish pass. Demo Monday.
- [[journal/2026-03-10]] — Lumen GM Hub PoC plan created. VoIP-first architecture decided. Spec updated to v3. Vault docs initialized.
- [[journal/2026-03-07]] — Vault initialized. Started Obsidian + Claude workflow.
